violations.description: Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item Styro to-go containers was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Need to be inverted.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities Floor were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.

General employee cleanliness. — --Noticed employee on phone with gloves on. Went back to work without washing hands/changing gloves. - Observed employee washing gloved hands. Remove old gloves, wash hands, and put new gloves on.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Boxes should be elevated at least 6 inches off of the ground. Move boxes containing chips to under the counter, elevated.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --No bucket with sanitizing cloth was observed during inspection. Always have a bucket of sani-solution ready and being used during operation.
General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Raw wood surfaces must be painted/sealed. - Seal/paint surface at the counter and seal shelves.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Clean microwave interior as often as necessary.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Seal holes in the wall to the right of the exhaust vent.
General premises. — --Provide pest control by means of screened windows, air curtain, etc. at serving windows.
Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Spray bottle over by cleaning agents is not labeled. Spray bottles must have labels to identify contents. ** corrected during inspection
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
